subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thy nearness is my hope and to commune with Thee, my joy. Thy love is my comfort and Thy Name, my prayer. Thy presence is my peace
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for nearness to God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God
